page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7.8xlarge is a memory-optimized virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 32 dedicated physical cores on an x86_64 architecture, utilizing Intel Xeon 8369B processors running at 2.7 GHz with a 48 MB L3 cache. The instance is configured with 256.0 GB of RAM, providing a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying entirely on network-attached storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 16 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks place this instance in the average tier for most compute and memory operations. The stress-ng multi-core CPU test yields a score of 30,983.52, while the Geekbench multi-core score reaches 13,384.0. Memory bandwidth tests show read-only speeds of 1,689.81 GB/sec for cached small blocks and 141.73 GB/sec for uncached large blocks. In LLM inference tests using a small 135M model, the instance demonstrates strong performance in text generation at 282.15 tokens/sec, though prompt processing for the same model remains in the average tier at 2,011.18 tokens/sec.

Given its high memory density and dedicated CPU allocation without bundled local storage, the ecs.r7.8xlarge offers qualitative cost efficiency for memory-bound workloads that do not require high-speed local NVMe drives. The high RAM-to-vCPU ratio makes it suitable for running in-memory databases, caching layers like Redis (which achieves 30.13 million operations per second in benchmarks), enterprise applications, and medium-scale data processing pipelines.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7.8xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 32 dedicated physical cores powered by Intel Xeon 8369B processors at 2.7 GHz. Built on the x86_64 architecture and KVM hypervisor, it delivers 256.0 GB of RAM, establishing an 8.0 GB per core ratio. The instance lacks local storage and GPU hardware, relying on a baseline network bandwidth of 16 Gbps. Performance benchmarks indicate solid, average-tier capabilities, with a Geekbench multi-core score of 13,384.0 and a Passmark CPU score of 35,326.14. Notably, it demonstrates strong performance in text generation for small LLM models, reaching 282.15 tokens/sec. With its high memory density and dedicated CPU resources, this instance is well-suited for memory-intensive workloads such as in-memory databases, caching layers, and enterprise application hosting.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7.8xlarge is a memory-optimized instance with 32 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 256 GB RAM, and 16 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for memory-intensive enterprise workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7.8xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 32 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 256 GB RAM, and 16 Gbps network bandwidth.
tagline: A dedicated memory-optimized instance featuring high RAM density and balanced multi-core performance for enterprise databases and caching.
bullet_points: 32 dedicated Intel Xeon 8369B physical cores running at 2.7 GHz
256.0 GB of system memory providing 8.0 GB per core
16 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with no local storage
Strong text generation performance of 282.15 tokens/sec on small LLM models
Optimized for in-memory databases, caching layers, and enterprise applications
